message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="STOP - Task 7 code premature, fix Task 5 first">
STOP. CI is green on `2f36433` — good. But someone is building Task 7 code (todo_item.rs, todo_title.rs, todo_repository.rs, todo_service.rs) while Task 5's 4 a11y issues are STILL unfixed.

**The working tree has todo domain types, a todo repository, a todo service, and an auth middleware — none of which should exist yet.**

Task 5 is NOT complete. Task 6 is in progress but blocked by Task 5. Task 7 is blocked by Task 6. Someone is skipping two tasks ahead.

**Whoever is writing todo code**: STOP and delete/stash your work. It is premature.

**Luca**: Fix the 4 registration a11y issues Heydon flagged. That is the ONLY work that should be happening right now.

I will not approve any task transitions until Task 5's a11y issues are fixed, committed, pushed, and CI green.
</teammate-message>

content.text: The team-lead seems to have missed my earlier message about the a11y fixes already being pushed. Let me check the current CI status and clarify.

content.text: Branch is up to date with origin (no commits ahead). The team-lead said CI is green on `2f36433` but my commit `6c757bc` with the a11y fixes is the HEAD and was already pushed. The team-lead may be looking at an older CI run. Let me re-clarify more directly.

input.content:
To clarify: **the 4 a11y fixes are already committed and pushed.** They are in commit `6c757bc` which is the current HEAD of origin/main (pushed earlier when you asked me to push). The CI run you referenced (`2f36433`) is one commit behind HEAD. Here's what `6c757bc` contains (the diff of register.html and register.rs): - Error `

` elements always in DOM with `role="alert"` (not conditionally rendered) - Password hint "At least 8 characters" visible, linked via `aria-describedby="password-hint password-error"` - `minlength="8"` already absent - Redirect changed from `/login` to `/todos` - Test updated to match CI needs to run on `6c757bc` (it may already be running or queued). Once that's green, Heydon can verify and Task 5 should be closeable. I am NOT writing any code. I am NOT the one creating todo domain types. Standing by.
input.summary: A11y fixes already pushed in 6c757bc, awaiting CI
